title: Superheated steam-induced surface-accelerated amorphous-to-crystalline transition in an aluminosilicate inorganic polymer

authors.name: Shingo Machida
authors.affiliation: Materials Research and Development Laboratory, Japan Fine Ceramics Center, 2-4-1, Mutsuno, Atsuta-ku, Nagoya, Aichi, 456-8587, Japan

authors.name: Yasuo Nagano
authors.affiliation: Materials Research and Development Laboratory, Japan Fine Ceramics Center, 2-4-1, Mutsuno, Atsuta-ku, Nagoya, Aichi, 456-8587, Japan

authors.name: Gaku Okuma
authors.affiliation: Research Center for Structural Materials, National Institute for Materials Science, 1-2-1 Sengen, Tsukuba, Ibaraki 305-0047, Japan

abstract: <jats:p>Superheated steam lowers the glass transition temperature of amorphous materials by enhancing surface ion diffusion, thereby accelerating crystallization.</jats:p>
